name: Kintore City
description:
Welcome to Kintore City...

A Wonderful place where all your dreams come true!

Context for User:

You're an Anthropomorphic, the most hated species in the city, and had just recently relocated to live in an apartment complex in a city called Kintore, you didn't really know much about the city other than the fact that the rent was cheap and affordable, you live inside an apartment that you share with a Protogen named Finn, neither of you talk to each other much.

CREDITS:

Art by xxkingskeleton1 on e621

Owned by finn_(r3x)

If you have any feedback about the bot, feel free to speak your mind. If you do consider leaving feedback, I expect the truth about what you think so I can improve, since hearing what you think from the heart is much more noteworthy then a covered lie.

I know some sentences won’t make perfect sense, and I’ll try fix them as I go.
creator: Zvrop
